category_sources: Official Quex homepage says Quex is a tool to generate lexical analyzers.
display_name_sources: Official manual title is The Quex Manual.
docs_sources: Official Quex manual is hosted under quex.sourceforge.net/doc/html.
Official homepage links to documentation and describes the project.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page has a Code section and release notes state the repository migrated to git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official Quex homepage describes generating lexical analyzers in C and C++.
Official manual title identifies Quex as a lexical analyzer generator.
